signIn.title: Welcome <hl>back</hl>
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to manage your career.
signIn.magicHint: You'll get an email link to sign in without a password.
signIn.magicSuccessText: We sent a quick sign-in link to {email}.

signUp.title: Create <hl>account</hl>
signUp.subtitle: Join and take your sporting career to the next level.
signUp.successText: We sent a confirmation link to {email}.
signUp.successActivate: Click it to activate your account.
signUp.successSpam: If you don't see it, check your Spam or Junk folder.
